description_long: This is a modern, rectangular desk constructed from light-colored wood with a subtle grain pattern. The desk features a spacious top surface with a gentle curve along the front edge for ergonomic comfort. On the right side, there is a set of three vertically stacked drawers with sleek, metallic handles, providing organized storage. The left side has an open cubby or shelf area, suitable for storing books, a computer tower, or other items. The desk is supported by sturdy side panels and reinforced with metal cylindrical supports beneath the top surface. Its clean lines and practical design make it suitable for contemporary workspaces.
description: A light wood desk with a curved front edge, three right-side drawers, and an open left-side shelf, supported by sturdy panels and metal accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, the curved front edge, and both the drawer unit and open shelf.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cubby/shelf and the desk's thickness, with the drawers not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels, the three drawers on the right, and the open shelf on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the drawer unit, with the open shelf obscured.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the curved edge and accessible drawers and shelf, intended to be approached from the front where the drawers and open cubby are visible.
